model.default_rule: previous copy source plus previous copy length if legal, else 0

copy_address_model.default_rule: previous copy source plus previous copy length if legal, else 0
copy_address_model.exception_source_alphabet: legal source positions excluding default source

copy_length_model.default_rule: copy decoder_max_possible length unless exception flag is false
copy_length_model.exception_length_alphabet: legal lengths from min_len through decoder_max_possible, excluding default length
copy_length_model.legal_symbol_count: max_length - min_len + 1 after source address is decoded

replaces.legal_symbol_count: max_length - min_len + 1 after source address is decoded
replaces.smoothing: global prior over copy length index restricted to currently legal indices

copy_length_model.smoothing: global prior over copy length index restricted to currently legal indices

item_type_model.conditioning: No previous item-type history is coded; charged emissions are conditioned only on the declared book split extra-context. Forced item types remain enforced but are not charged.

replaces.conditioning: BOS-padded previous N item types within each declared book; forced item types remain in context history but are not charged as coded emissions

literal_payload_model.context_source: previous N emitted digits in the already generated digit stream, left-padded with BOS before enough digits exist

recipe_generation.description: Each book is reparsed with the active deterministic LZ parser using only component counts from previously emitted books; counts are updated after committing the parsed book.

recipe_representation.copy_target_start: derived from cumulative operation position within book
recipe_representation.operation_type: derived from op field shape: text => literal, source_digit_pos+length => copy

scope: 70 raw digit books in numeric order
